title: scrophularia lateriflora
intro: Scrophularia lateriflora, also known as Lousewort or Figwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia lateriflora include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Scrophularia lateriflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
